geography: City of Columbus Division of Water service area
subsidyType: citywide replacement at no direct charge when construction reaches an eligible property
publicSideCovered: yes public-side replacement is covered during scheduled work
privateSideCovered: yes private-side lead and galvanized lines are replaced during scheduled work
propertyRules: property owner must sign a work agreement and the property must be in the replacement program area
contractorRules: city crews or contractors perform the scheduled replacement
